message:
fix(h2): enforce RFC 7540 §5.1 idle stream connection errors + clippy fix

DATA and WINDOW_UPDATE on idle streams now correctly produce connection
errors (GOAWAY/PROTOCOL_ERROR) instead of stream errors (RST_STREAM).
Adds is_idle_stream_id helper to StreamStore and two regression tests.

Also fixes pre-existing clippy similar_names lint in gf256.rs
(seen -> visited).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
